summary: The patient recently completed their initial rabies vaccinations but significant time has lapsed; therefore, maintaining adequate immunity requires reinforcing through additional vaccines according to current recommendations from authoritative sources like ACIP despite prior immunizations. Administer two doses spaced three days apart per standard protocols endorsed by experts due to known decline rates after prolonged intervals between shots even when originally well-vaccinated subjects
